channel.title: dfs on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in dfs on changcui

item.title: Word Break
item.description: // 思路一：DFS，记忆数组，set 保存 class Solution { public: bool wordBreak(string s, vector<string>& wordDict) { unordered_set<string> se(wordDict.begin(), wordDict.end()); vector<int> memo(s.size(), -1); return helper(s, 0, memo, se); } bool helper(string& s, int start, vector<int>& memo, unordered_set<string> se) { if (start == s.size()) return true; if (memo[start] != -1) return memo[start]; for (int i = start + 1; i <= s.size(); i++) { if (se.count(s.substr(start, i - start)) && helper(s, i, memo, se)) { return memo[start] = 1; } } return memo[start] = 0; } }; // Runtime: 48 ms, faster than 6.

item.title: 机器人的运动范围
item.description: // 思路一：DFS class Solution { public: int sum_(int r, int l) { int rtn = 0; while (r || l) { rtn += r % 10 + l % 10; r /= 10; l /= 10; } return rtn; } int movingCount(int threshold, int rows, int cols) { int rtn = 0; vector<vector<bool> > visited(rows, vector<bool>(cols, false)); helper(rtn, threshold, 0, 0, visited, rows, cols); return rtn; } void helper(int& rtn, int threshold, int i, int j, vector<vector<bool> >& visited, int rows, int cols) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= rows || j >= cols || visited[i][j] || sum_(i, j) > threshold) return; rtn++; visited[i][j] = true; helper(rtn, threshold, i+1, j, visited, rows, cols); helper(rtn, threshold, i-1, j, visited, rows, cols); helper(rtn, threshold, i, j+1, visited, rows, cols); helper(rtn, threshold, i, j-1, visited, rows, cols); } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：616k

item.title: 矩阵中的路径
item.description: // 思路一：DFS 回溯 class Solution { public: bool hasPath(char* matrix, int rows, int cols, char* str) { for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) { if (helper(matrix, i, j, 0, rows, cols, str)) return true; } } return false; } bool helper(char* matrix, int i, int j, int len, int rows, int cols, char* str) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= rows || j >= cols || matrix[i*cols+j] !

item.title: 257.Binary Tree Paths
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<string> binaryTreePaths(TreeNode* root) { vector<string> res; DFS("", res, root); return res; } void DFS(string out, vector<string>& res, TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return; if (!root->left && !root->right) {out += to_string(root->val); res.push_back(out); return;} if (root->left) DFS(out+to_string(root->val)+"->", res, root->left); if (root->right) DFS(out+to_string(root->val)+"->", res, root->right); } };

item.title: 113.Path Sum II
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> pathSum(TreeNode* root, int sum) { vector<vector<int>> res; DFS(root, {}, res, sum); return res; } void DFS(TreeNode* root, vector<int> out, vector<vector<int>>& res, int sum) { if (!root) return; out.push_back(root->val); if (!root->left && !root->right && root->val == sum) { res.

item.title: 93.Restore IP Addresses
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<string> restoreIpAddresses(string s) { vector<string> result; if (s.size() > 12) return result; DFS(0, 0, "", result, s); return result; } void DFS(int num, int cur, string out, vector<string>& result, string s) { if (num == 4 && cur == s.size()) {out.pop_back(); result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 1; i <= 3 && cur + i <= s.size(); i++) { auto tmp = s.substr(cur, i); if (stoi(tmp) < 256 && !

item.title: 332.Reconstruct Itinerary
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<string> findItinerary(vector<vector<string>>& tickets) { unordered_map<string, multiset<string>> m; for (auto j : tickets) m[j[0]].insert(j[1]); vector<string> result; DFS(m, "JFK", result); return vector<string>(result.rbegin(), result.rend()); } void DFS(unordered_map<string, multiset<string>>& m, string s, vector<string>& result){ while (m[s].size() > 0) { string tmp = *m[s].begin(); m[s].erase(m[s].begin()); DFS(m, tmp, result); } result.push_back(s); } };

item.title: Number of Islands
item.description: // 思路一：遇到1，就把临近的1变为0，并计数 class Solution { public: int numIslands(vector<vector<char>>& grid) { if (grid.size() == 0) return 0; int cnt = 0, m = grid.size(), n = grid[0].size(); for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == '1') { helper(grid, i, j); cnt++; } } } return cnt; } void helper(vector<vector<char>>& grid, int i, int j) { int m = grid.
